---
title: "texture_triangle"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{texture_triangle}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(soilR)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggtern)
```

```{r Y_triangles-de-texture_USDA}
ggplot(data = TT_USDA, aes(y = argile, x = sable, z = limon, fill = texture)) +
  coord_tern("x","y", "z") +
  theme_rgbw() +
  theme_showsecondary() +
  theme_showarrows() +
  custom_percent("(%)") +
  theme(legend.justification = c(0, 1),
        legend.position      = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(#title = "Classification des textures du triangle de l'USDA",
    fill  = 'Classe',
    color = 'Classe') +
  geom_polygon(color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = TT_USDA %>% group_by(texture) %>% summarise(mZ = mean(limon), mY = mean(argile)), aes(x = 100 - mY - mZ, y = mY, z = mZ), size = 3)
```

```{r Y_triangles-de-texture_AISNE}
# ggplot(data = TT_AISNE, aes(y = argile, x = sable, z = limon, fill = texture)) +
#   coord_tern("x","y", "z") +
#   theme_rgbw() +
#   theme_showsecondary() +
#   theme_showarrows() +
#   custom_percent("(%)") +
#   theme(legend.justification = c(0, 1),
#         legend.position      = c(0, 1),
#         plot.title.position = "bottom") +
#   labs(title = "Classification des textures du triangle de l'AISNE",
#        fill  = 'Classe',
#        color = 'Classe') +
#   geom_polygon(color = "black") +
#   geom_point(data = TT_AISNE %>% group_by(texture) %>% summarise(mZ = mean(limon), mY = mean(argile)), aes(x = 100 - mY - mZ, y = mY, z = mZ))
```
